offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 endorsement changes/month, delays cause client dissatisfaction. We automate the conversion and filing of endorsement changes instead of manual filing and tracking.
problem: Delays in processing endorsement changes lead to client dissatisfaction and potential loss of business.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and advice
try_it: Let users try manual entry for endorsement details on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing endorsement data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
